subject: AP Computer Science A
notes: 2014 College Board sample contributes MCQ only; sample FRQ has suggested solutions but no full scoring guideline and is excluded from FRQ bank.
GridWorld is marked as a legacy practice source.
CSA prompts/options must be structured as text, tables, and fenced Java code; prompt screenshots are not part of the student-facing delivery standard.
2025 current CED sample questions are included as official current-source content; CED MCQ options are A-D and are intentionally not padded to A-E.
2018 AP Bowl / Georgia Tech practice questions are included as public practice content after answer, duplicate, Java-version, code rendering, and unit review; two items were excluded before publish.
CSAwesome / Runestone open-curriculum practice questions are included with GFDL 1.3 source metadata and source credit after structured RST, answer, image, duplicate, and unit review.
A small LynkEdu-owned U1 original batch is included to improve Primitive Types coverage without misclassifying later-unit items.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Computer Science A Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
